srTitle: Split the G: score your pour
subtitle: One photo of your pint, we score the G line. Share on the wall or chase the board.
step1: Straight-on pint, G and foam line visible.
step2: Start analysis and hold still for the score.
step3: Post to the wall or climb the leaderboard.
startAnalysisHint: Line up the pint and G, hold steady, or upload below.
feedbackGVisible: Make sure the G pattern is visible
moment: This will just take a moment
noGModalBody: Please make sure the G pattern is clearly visible in your image and try again.
inferenceUnavailable: Live camera guidance is temporarily unavailable. You can still upload a photo.
cameraDenied: Camera unavailable or permission denied. Allow camera access or use Upload an image instead.
pwaBannerSubtitleIos: Quick access like a native app
pwaBannerIosBodySafari: Tap Share, then Add to Home Screen.
pwaBannerIosBodyChrome: Tap ⋯ (More), then Add to Home Screen.
pwaBannerIosBodyFirefox: Open the menu (☰), tap Share, then Add to Home Screen.
pwaBannerIosBodyGeneric: Use Share or your browser’s ⋯ menu, then Add to Home Screen.
pwaBannerChromeHint: Tap Install, then confirm in the prompt.
flashUnavailable: Flash isn't available on this camera.
